mapper.select: select id, user_id, date from check_in where user_id = #{userId} and date = #{date}
select id, user_id, date from check_in where user_id = #{userId} order by date desc
select id, user_id, date from check_in where user_id = #{userId} and date like concat(#{yearMonth}, '%') order by date
select count(*) from check_in where user_id = #{userId}
